query:
SELECT id, name, category, photos 
FROM products 
WHERE category = 'pre-rolls' 
   OR photos LIKE '%unsplash%'
   OR photos LIKE '%placeholder%'
   OR photos IS NULL
ORDER BY category, name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute 
SELECT id, name, category, photos 
FROM products 
WHERE category = 'pre-rolls' 
   OR photos LIKE '%unsplash%'
   OR photos LIKE '%placeholder%'
   OR photos IS NULL
ORDER BY category, name;
